description: Analysis specification for specialty chemical and materials manufacturers/distributors - identifying non-commoditized chemical companies with revenue and customer scale indicators

categories.label: Specialty Chemical (Accept)
categories.description: Company manufactures or distributes non-commoditized, bespoke chemical products that are not traded commodities and don't have price indices

categories.label: Potential Specialty Chemical (Flag)
categories.description: Company may manufacture or distribute specialty chemicals but evidence is unclear or mixed with commodity products

categories.label: Commoditized Chemical (Reject)
categories.description: Company primarily deals with commoditized chemicals that are traded, have price indices, or are standard bulk chemicals

categories.label: Unrelated Business (Reject)
categories.description: Company is not involved in chemical manufacturing or distribution at all

address.description: Full street address or business location

questions.question: Does this company manufacture or distribute non-commoditized chemical products? Non-commoditized chemical products typically means they don't have a price index, they are bespoke/custom, and are not traded commodities. Answer: Accept (clearly non-commoditized), Flag (unclear or mixed), or Reject (commoditized or not chemical-related).

Is this company likely to do more than $25 million in revenue on a yearly basis? Look for evidence like: number of employees (50+ suggests higher revenue), facility size, market presence, customer base, years in business, geographic footprint. Answer: Yes, No, or Insufficient evidence.

Is this company likely to be serving 100+ customers? Look for evidence like: mentions of customer count, market reach, distribution network, sales team size, product catalog breadth. Answer: Yes, No, or Insufficient evidence.
